attributes.name: text
attributes.description: Set a string you wish to copy to the clipboard

attributes.name: copy-from
attributes.description:
Copies the text content from another element by specifying the ID of the element
The ID of the element does not need to start with # like a CSS selector
If this property is set, the value property is ignored

attributes.name: animation-state-delay
attributes.description: The delay in milliseconds before the button returns to its default state after a successful copy

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Specifies the type of button

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button, changes the looks of it and prevents if from emitting the click event

attributes.name: look
attributes.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

attributes.name: compact
attributes.description: Makes the left and right padding of the button narrower.

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: Sets the state of the button. With waiting state a loader will show, the success and fail states display icons. State is automatically reset to the default after 3 seconds.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Set an href, this will turns the button into a anchor tag.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Set an anchor tag target, only used when using href.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description: Set the rel attribute for an anchor tag, only used when using href.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Sets the title attribute, which provides a tooltip for both button and anchor elements.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: This is a name property of the component.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Value of this form control.
If you dont want the setFormValue to be called on the ElementInternals, then prevent calling this method, by not calling super.value = newValue in your implementation of the value setter method.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

attributes.name: required-message
attributes.description: Required validation message.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Apply custom error on this input.

attributes.name: error-message
attributes.description: Custom error message.

attributes.name: pristine
attributes.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

attributes.name: popovertarget
attributes.description: Set a popovertarget.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Set a string you wish to copy to the clipboard

properties.name: copyFrom
properties.description:
Copies the text content from another element by specifying the ID of the element
The ID of the element does not need to start with # like a CSS selector
If this property is set, the value property is ignored

properties.name: animationStateDelay
properties.description: The delay in milliseconds before the button returns to its default state after a successful copy

properties.name: type
properties.description: Specifies the type of button

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disables the button, changes the looks of it and prevents if from emitting the click event

properties.name: look
properties.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

properties.name: compact
properties.description: Makes the left and right padding of the button narrower.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Sets the state of the button. With waiting state a loader will show, the success and fail states display icons. State is automatically reset to the default after 3 seconds.

properties.name: href
properties.description: Set an href, this will turns the button into a anchor tag.

properties.name: target
properties.description: Set an anchor tag target, only used when using href.

properties.name: rel
properties.description: Set the rel attribute for an anchor tag, only used when using href.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Sets the title attribute, which provides a tooltip for both button and anchor elements.

properties.name: formAssociated
properties.description:
This is a static class field indicating that the element is can be used inside a native form and participate in its events.
It may require a polyfill, check support here https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/attachInternals.
Read more about form controls here https://web.dev/more-capable-form-controls/

properties.name: name
properties.description: This is a name property of the component.

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Value of this form control.
If you dont want the setFormValue to be called on the ElementInternals, then prevent calling this method, by not calling super.value = newValue in your implementation of the value setter method.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

properties.name: requiredMessage
properties.description: Required validation message.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Apply custom error on this input.

properties.name: errorMessage
properties.description: Custom error message.

properties.name: pristine
properties.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

properties.name: label
properties.description: label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: popoverContainerElement
properties.description: Set a popovertarget.

events.name: copying
events.description: Fires before the content is about to copied to the clipboard and can be used to transform or modify the data before its added to the clipboard

events.name: copied
events.description: Fires when the content is copied to the clipboard

events.name: click
events.description: fires when the element is clicked

slots.description: Use to replace the default content of the copy icon

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-background-color-hover
cssProperties.description: overwrite the background color for hover state

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-background-color-disabled
cssProperties.description: overwrite the background color for disabled state

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-border-color-hover
cssProperties.description: overwrite the border color for hover state

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-border-color-disabled
cssProperties.description: overwrite the border color for disabled state

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-contrast-hover
cssProperties.description: overwrite the text color for hover state

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-contrast-disabled
cssProperties.description: overwrite the text color for disabled state

cssProperties.name: --uui-button-transition
cssProperties.description: Add transition to the button. Default is none.
